content.en:
The first layer of the Battle Power Tower corresponds to the combat power of the ordinary half-step perfect master, the second layer corresponds to the combat power of the top half-step perfect master, and the third layer corresponds to the combat power of the peak half-step perfect master.

As for the fourth layer, once you break through, you will have the combat power of the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, or the combat power of the perfect master.

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the first layer of the Battle Power Tower, and soon a cultivator appeared in front of him, as long as the strength was comparable to that of the other party and he was not defeated, it was equivalent to having the combat power of the first layer of the Battle Power Tower.

In an instant, Ye Tian used his perfect body, swallowing the sky, fighting with the opponent with all his might, and in the blink of an eye, he used the Ten Thousand Dao Blade to instantly hit the opponent, and easily broke through the first layer of the Combat Power Tower.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian came to the second floor of the Battle Power Tower, and another cultivator condensed out.

Although this cultivator was not a real cultivator, his strength was comparable to that of a top-level half-step perfect master.

Ye Tian at least needs to fight with the other party, or have the strength to crush the other party, so that he can be regarded as having the combat power of a top-level half-step perfect controller.

Wow!

The battle is on!

This cultivator held a condensed sword, piercing hundreds of millions of time and space with a single sword, concentrating on one point with the power to shatter everything, and instantly knocking Ye Tian away.

"What a terrible strength, I have a perfect body, and I have trained into a sky-swallowing battle body, and I am not as good as the other party in terms of strength!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Immediately.

Ye Tian found that the other party's controlling body was stronger than him, his will was stronger than him, and the perfect control technique he used was also much stronger than him.

It can be said that the other party is almost crushed in other aspects, except for the fact that the Dao change mark is not as great as him.

Moreover, at his current realm, the Devouring Mountain physique is almost useless, and the Devouring Domain will also be broken by the other party.

Therefore, soon, Ye Tian had a tendency to lose.

Ye Tian didn't continue to fight, and directly chose to admit defeat and leave the Battle Tower.

At this time.

Ye Tian already had a clear understanding of his strength.

"It looks like I'm still a little way from the top half-step perfect master!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, he was only fighting against a weaker top-notch half-step perfect master, and he couldn't beat such an opponent.

However, he was almost invincible among ordinary half-step perfect controllers, and he could completely crush them.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to sort out his cultivation experience and began the next path of cultivation.

First of all, the chains of control still need to be broken.

According to what he knew so far, it was many times easier to break the control chain among those who broke through to a half-step perfect master, but there were many control chains, about three thousand.

Therefore, he needs to constantly break the chain of control, and with each more break, his strength will increase slightly.

In addition, the Variety Void Technique needs to continue to practice and improve one's half-step perfect control will.

Moreover, he also needs to constantly participate in the changes of the Dao, and strive to master more changes of the Dao to more than a billion kinds.

Of course, he still has to create more Perfect Masteries, and when he has enough Perfect Controls, he can try to create top-notch Perfect Controls.

At that time, he can definitely rank among the top half-step perfect controllers.

After a period of time had passed, on this day, the Lord of Blood Separation came to inform Ye Tian that he could go to the Capital of Blood War.

......

Outside the Ruins of Eternity.

Ye Tian followed the Lord of Blood Separation and shuttled, and soon came to a place.

Here, Ye Tian sensed an area surrounded by mist.

In an instant, Ye Tian's expression changed.

"Lord of Blood, this mist is an incomparably powerful life, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Hey, Ye Tian, you actually recognized it, you know, even those extremely powerful peak half-step perfect controllers don't know that this mist is a creature, they just think it's a weird mist. This is a secret that only the perfect controller knows, but I didn't expect you to see through it at a glance!"

The Lord of Blood Separation was surprised.

If he didn't have the talent of copying, Ye Tian would actually not be able to see through the true nature of the mist.

But under the shroud of replication talent, he actually sensed the talent situation from the fog, what is this not a creature?

【Serpent of the Mist】

This is the name of this mist, enveloping such a huge area, it turned out to be a creature, countless times larger than the largest creature Ye Tian had ever seen before!

"The Lord of Blood Separation, such a huge creature is definitely comparable to the perfect controller, it is a little ...... to establish a Blood War Capital in such a place" Ye Tian said solemnly.

"Hahaha, Ye Tian, you are too worried, this mist is a mist snake, although its strength is much stronger than me, but it has been subdued, and it has signed an agreement with several of our big forces, so it will not attack you, and will even protect you. Of course, you must have a contract order to enter, otherwise you will be stopped by it. The reason why I chose this place is that it is very special, and once you enter, you will know it. The second reason is that the mist in the body of the Misty Serpent can temper a half-step perfect will, this is an excellent place, and it will not attack you, where to find such a good treasure land!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian somewhat understood.

Subsequently.

The Lord of Bloodshed pulled out a gray contract token.

The next moment.

An unimaginable huge mist vortex emerged, directly swallowing the Blood Separation Lord and Ye Tian into it.

In an instant, they came to another void.

"We're in!"

The Lord of Blood.

After a little more shuttle, they came to the capital of bloody battle.

The Capital of Blood is located on a huge mountain of incomparably large mountains, and this mountain is extraordinary.

Before Ye Tian entered this mountain, he felt unimaginable pressure, the pressure here even distorted time and space, and the Dao was about to collapse.

However, it is not an ordinary pressure, and when it is suppressed, it can also temper the body of control.

"This mountain can temper our mastery body?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"Not bad. The Lord of Blood Separation said: "This mountain is called Zhendao Mountain, the most terrifying place in Zhendao Mountain is where even the perfect controller can't withstand it, and the place where the blood battle capital is located is a place that the half-step perfect controller can bear." In addition, there are many treasures in Zhendao Mountain. At the beginning, when this Zhendao Mountain was discovered, it caused many perfect controllers to fight, and the fallen perfect controllers alone exceeded three digits, and finally the major forces joined forces to occupy this place and formed the capital of bloody war, which solved the trouble. "

Soon.

Ye Tian followed the Lord of Blood Separation to the Blood War Capital, and the Blood Separation Lord went through the entry procedures for Ye Tian, and Ye Tian officially became a member of the Blood War Capital.

For the next 100,000 eternal years, he can practice here and enjoy many benefits, but he also has to face a lot of competition.

Soon after, the Lord of Blood was gone, after all, the Lord of Blood was not the perfect master of the Blood War Capital, so he could not stay here for long.

And Ye Tian also got a place to live and officially settled here.

And for the first time, Ye Tian was not a cultivator, nor was he a treasure land to go to the capital of bloody battles, but a fusion of the perfect level ancestral endowment from the Misty Snake.

That's right, that incomparably terrifying Misty Snake also has a perfect-level ancestral endowment, and there is more than one, but now it's all his!
